interaction_phrase: Nick Farina, co-founder & CEO of EeroQ
occurrence_sentence: "Building a scalable quantum computer demands speed, and AI is one of the most powerful tools we have to get there," said Nick Farina, co-founder & CEO of EeroQ.

In a [1999 paper in Science](https://www.science.org/doi/10.1126/science.284.5422.1967), a collaboration between researchers at Bell Labs and Michigan State University proposed that an [electron on liquid helium](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Electron-on-helium_qubit) would make an exceptional quantum computer using the vertical motion of the electron above the helium surface, so-called "Rydberg states" of the electron motion.

Cao, Shuxiang, et al. "QCalEval: Benchmarking Vision-Language Models for Quantum Calibration Plot Understanding." arXiv preprint arXiv:2604.25884 (2026).

We introduce QCalEval, the first VLM benchmark for quantum calibration plots: 243 samples across 87 scenario types from 22 experiment families, spanning superconducting qubits and neutral atoms, evaluated on six question types in both zero-shot and in-context learning settings.
As a reference case study, we release NVIDIA Ising Calibration 1, an open-weight model based on Qwen3.5-35B-A3B that reaches 74.7 zero-shot average score.

Today, there are six major approaches to building a quantum computer: superconducting circuits, ion traps, neutral atoms, photonics, silicon spin, and topological qubits. interaction_phrase: collaboration with the University of Illinois Chicago
occurrence_sentence: Last year, EeroQ sponsored a collaboration with the University of Illinois Chicago (UIC) undergraduates for a Senior Design Project as a part of an Engineering Design requirement for graduation.
EeroQ's Chief Science Officer Johannes Pollanen, led the collaborative project, "High-impedance superconducting microwave frequency resonators for quantum computing."

interaction_phrase: work with a real quantum company
occurrence_sentence: Spearheading the EeroQ and UIC collaboration, Professor Zizwe Chase stated, "UIC being in the Chicagoland area has given our students the opportunity and privilege to not only visit a preeminent Quantum Start-up, but with the graciousness shown by EeroQ, has allowed our students to work with a real quantum company in a hands-on project.

interaction_phrase: collaboration with the University of Illinois Chicago (UIC)
occurrence_sentence: Last year, EeroQ sponsored a collaboration with the University of Illinois Chicago (UIC) undergraduates for a Senior Design Project as a part of an Engineering Design requirement for graduation.

interaction_phrase: UIC being in the Chicagoland area has given our students the opportunity and privilege to not only visit a preeminent Quantum Start-up, but with the graciousness shown by EeroQ

interaction_phrase: EeroQ's Chief Science Officer Johannes Pollanen
occurrence_sentence: EeroQ's Chief Science Officer Johannes Pollanen, led the collaborative project, "High-impedance superconducting microwave frequency resonators for quantum computing."

This initiative is a first of its kind at EeroQ, and it has left a lasting impression on both the participating students and Professor Pollanen. He stated, "Working with the UIC students has been a fantastic experience!
EeroQ and UIC collaborate to train the next generation of quantum engineers.

interaction_phrase: researchers from the University of Oslo, Michigan State University and EeroQ Corporation
occurrence_sentence: A paper published today in Physical Review A by researchers from the University of Oslo, Michigan State University and EeroQ Corporation introduces a new scheme for entanglement between two electrons that remain relatively far apart.

occurrence_sentence: "Alongside the significant progress at EeroQ in developing spin qubits with electrons on the surface of helium, the new results we present in this paper show there is still much to explore with this system," EeroQ's Director of Quantum Engineering and co-author, Dr. Niyaz Beysengulov stated.
